scripts.dev: sh -c 'if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd frontend && bun run build) && (cd backend && STATIC_ROOT=../frontend/dist bun --env-file=../.env run dev); elif command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd frontend && pnpm run build) && (cd backend && STATIC_ROOT=../frontend/dist pnpm run dev); else (cd frontend && npm run build) && (cd backend && STATIC_ROOT=../frontend/dist npm run dev); fi'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && bun run build) && (cd frontend && bun run build); elif command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && pnpm run build) && (cd frontend && pnpm run build); else (cd backend && npm run build) && (cd frontend && npm run build); fi'
scripts.start: sh -c 'if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && bun run start); elif command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then (cd backend && pnpm run start); else (cd backend && npm run start); fi'
